title: Blockchain data storage system and method
abstract: The invention relates to a blockchain data storage system (1) for storing first data (D1) of patient medical devices (10) and/or second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12), comprising a communication interface (14) configured to receive the first data (D1) of the patient medical devices (10) and/or the second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12), and a plurality of nodes (16, 18, 20) configured to store the first data (D1) of the patient medical devices (10) and/or the second data (D2) of the medical data communication devices (12). Furthermore, the invention relates to a computer-implemented method for storing first data (D1) of patient medical devices (10) and/or second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12) on a blockchain data storage system.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. Blockchain data storage system (1) for storing first data (DI) of patient medical devices (10), in particular implantable medical devices, and/or second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12), comprising: a communication interface (14) configured to receive the first data (DI) of the patient medical devices (10) and/or the second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12); and a plurality of nodes (16, 18, 20) configured to store the first data (DI) of the patient medical devices (10) and/or the second data (D2) of the medical data communication devices (12). 2. Blockchain data storage system of claim 1, wherein the first data (DI) of patient medical devices (10) comprises a programming of the patient medical devices (10), patient medical data acquired by the patient medical devices (10) and/or manufacturing data of the patient medical devices (10). 3. Blockchain data storage system of claim 2, wherein the programming of the patient medical devices (10) comprises an initial programming of the patient medical devices (10) and any modifications to the programming of the patient medical devices (10) since the initial programming. 4. Blockchain data storage system of claim 2 or 3, wherein the patient medical data acquired by the patient medical devices (10) comprises an implantation and/or explantation date of the patient medical devices (10), and wherein the manufacturing data of the patient medical devices (10) comprises a manufacturing date and/or a serial number of components (22), in particular a battery, of the patient medical devices (10). 5. Blockchain data storage system of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the second data (D2) comprises configuration and/or programming data of the medical data communication devices (12), in particular a patient communication device. 6. Blockchain data storage system of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the blockchain data storage system (1) is configured to create a notification (24) to a data processing system (26) of a health care service provider when identifying false implant programming and/or a recalled, broken or expired component, in particular a capacitor, an electrode and/or a battery, of the patient medical device (10), and wherein the blockchain data storage system (1) is configured to store the notifications (24) to the data processing system (26) of the health care service provider. 7. Blockchain data storage system of claim 6, wherein false implant programming is identified if the implant programming and/or an implant operation mode does not match at least one of a current patient condition and a location and/or in an event of a battery drain. 8. Blockchain data storage system of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the blockchain data storage system (1) comprises an authorization module (28) configured to grant a write permission to a first group of users, in particular manufacturers, suppliers and physicians and a read permission to a second group of users, in particular patients and authorities. 9. Blockchain data storage system of claim 8, wherein the communication interface (14) is an app of a mobile communication device and/or a web-interface accessible by a computing device usable by the first group of users and/or the second group of users, wherein the communication interface (14) is configured to receive data transmissions of the first data (DI) of patient medical devices (10) and/or the second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12). 10. Blockchain data storage system of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the communication interface (14) is configured to receive manual data input and/or provides voice-to-text data conversion. 11. Blockchain data storage system of any one of the preceding claims, wherein a separate blockchain is used for each patient medical device (10) and/or each medical data 

 communication device (12) or a single blockchain is used for multiple patient medical devices (10) and/or multiple medical data communication devices (12). 12. Blockchain data storage system of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the communication interface (14) is configured to receive wearable data (30), in particular generated by a smartring, a smartphone and/or a smartwatch, wherein the wearable data (30) is part of the first data (DI) of patient medical devices (10) and/or the second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12). 13. Blockchain data storage system of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the blockchain data storage system (1) is configured to provide secure access to medical data, in particular by means of asymmetric and/or symmetric cryptography. 14. Computer-implemented method for storing first data (DI) of patient medical devices (10) and/or second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12) on a blockchain data storage system (1), comprising the steps of: receiving (SI) the first data (DI) of the patient medical devices (10) and/or the second data (D2) of medical data communication devices (12) by a communication interface (14); and storing (S2) the first data (DI) of the patient medical devices (10) and/or the second data (D2) of the medical data communication devices (12) on a plurality of nodes (16, 18, 20) of the blockchain data storage system (1). 15. Computer program with program code to perform the method of claim 14 when the computer program is executed on a computer.
